title: Mouthwatering Slovakian Meat Skewers
description: Indulge in the bold flavors of Slovakia with these sour and shaggy meat skewers, featuring chili powder and wok-hei, perfect for a raw-friendly raclette-grill experience.
instructions: Preheat the raclette-grill to medium-high heat, around 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together chili powder, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Add the pork pieces to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the spice mixture.
Thread the pork, onion, and bell pepper pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with lemon juice and olive oil.
Place the skewers on the raclette-grill and cook for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
Check the internal temperature of the pork to ensure it reaches 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
Let the skewers rest for 2-3 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or thyme if desired.
